import unittest

from reference_sut import normalize_whitespace


class NormalizeWhitespaceTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_text_partitions(self):
        self.assertEqual(normalize_whitespace('  Quality   Engineering '), 'Quality Engineering')
        self.assertEqual(normalize_whitespace(''), '')
        self.assertEqual(normalize_whitespace('   '), '')
        self.assertEqual(normalize_whitespace('\tQuality\nEngineering'), 'Quality Engineering')
